channel.title: Alertdialog on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Alertdialog on Make Things Happen

item.title: How to make DatePicker stretch when CalendarView does not fit the screen?
item.description: In Android we have to deal with both big screen and small screens, tablets, watches, TVs and many other devices. In our case, we had a device with a 3.2" display and other one with 5" display. And on both of them we show a DatePicker dialog to choose a date. And guess what? Especially for the current month of October, there was a small difference. Can you guess it in the screenshot below?
